title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Kinemon, Unknown person #9, Chopper, Unknown person #10, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #11 as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Amigasa Village: 2 days until the raid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We've arrived!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We made it, Master!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Heeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Chopper!! Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: O-TAMA!! I was so worried!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: FURURU RURU!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sir Kim Emom!! We have gathered 200 more people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: SERSI- Ously!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With this, our numbers have grown to around 4200...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have yet to hear from Sir Law, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Who cares if he joins or not!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No, he is insanely strong, shinobu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big bro trained too much. He is not waking up at all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Flower Capital- RaseTSU District: The Prisoner Showcase

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The people caught in the capital...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is regret- full to say, but there is nothing we can do.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Even their families have been caught!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The hardest of Samuel are there, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, guard!! The festival is soon!! I want to attend it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Not a chance!! Silence!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Dammit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This is our final chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though everyone is putting their lives on the line...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You have worked hard, every- one!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Use the remaining time to move and prepare for the upcoming battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: We shall meet at the promised Port!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Under- stood!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, sir Luffy, our group will be leaving now.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: One day until the RAID...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We must arrive ahead of everyone else.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sunny is on the beach here, so we'll be fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't get captured!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course! We will be on high alert!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We are counting on you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You can count on us!!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: All right!! Let's meet at the Port!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: and even more unfortunate labourers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is it true...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What do you mean!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey,did you hear that rumour about Lord Yasuie? They said that he covered for the Red Scabbards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that paper!! Apparently, it was not just a prank!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was a hidden message for a raid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Do not give me false hope...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Kozuki family met such a terrible fate 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if kin'emon and the others have survived somehow... their minds must be shattered at this point.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They will not be able to stand up to them again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We will never be free...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hang in there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no one... who is able to stand up against Kaido....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
